_comment: Curated calm/instrumental tracks by Kevin MacLeod, mirrored on the Internet Archive (archive.org/details/Incompetech). All licensed Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 — using any track REQUIRES crediting it in the YouTube description. video2yt-music-swap writes the required credit lines to <output>_music_credits.txt. To expand this library: add more entries here (any archive.org direct-MP3 URL with a real sha256 + duration), or drop your own files into ~/.cache/video2yt/music/ (e.g. tracks downloaded from the YouTube Audio Library, which need no attribution).
